title: ATTICUS_MPO context-carrying memory-engine upgrade
content: ATTICUS_MPO should upgrade StoredMemoryCell from a thin finding-only structure into a compact context-bearing cell. The upgraded cell should preserve a finding plus minimal reusable context such as context_summary, context_scope, context_tags, baseline snapshot, lineage, and a context fingerprint. Retrieval and injection should rank cells by relevance and scope instead of only recency.
context_summary: Locked design direction for the next MPO memory-engine sprint. Focus is on context-bearing memory cells, bounded retrieval, safer rehydration, and backward-compatible persistence evolution.
